free_text: Angular Distributions of Protons from Na23(d,p)Na24
Absorbing foils in front of each emulsion were
arranged so that the integrated flux of protons in a
limited energy range could be determined.
The target material is supported on a 0.2-mil
polyethylene foil which is mounted perpendicular to
the beam at the center of the chamber. Targets were
prepared for most runs by evaporating a solution of
Na2CO3 to dryness on a polyethylene foil, although
NaOH was similarly used in a few instances.
